findings.description: `contentPathRewriteRules` (the actual XML property name used in the configuration example) is absent from s4 hints. Only `contentsPathRewriteRules` (from the settings table) is listed. The source XML example uses `contentPathRewriteRules` (without the extra 's'), so users searching for that name would miss this section via hint-based retrieval.
findings.source_evidence: Source XML example: `<property name="contentPathRewriteRules">` vs source table column: `contentsPathRewriteRules`
